title: Pet Groomer

rationales.taskAutomation: Handling live animals safely while cutting, bathing, and styling coats is unpredictable physical work with essentially no reliable automation today.
rationales.toolMaturity: Automated pet-washing stations exist as a niche product but nothing performs a full groom on an uncooperative animal.
rationales.adoption: Adoption of any grooming automation is negligible; booking-software adoption is far more common than physical automation.
rationales.agenticExposure: Appointment scheduling and reminder messaging are agent-ownable; handling and grooming the animal are not.

tasksAtRisk: Basic retail product recommendations for pet owners
tasksGrowing: Handling anxious or difficult animals safely
Building trust with regular clients and their pets
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 39-2021, p25-p75 rounded

defenseSkills.skill: Safe handling of anxious or aggressive animals
AI booking and client-reminder app fluency

insight: No automated station can safely handle an anxious, wriggling animal through a full groom. The job's small digital footprint, booking and reminders, is where its modest exposure is concentrated.
